protein_name: Endopeptidase that degrades various components of the extracellular matrix. May activate progelatinase A. Belongs to the peptidase M10A family. Appeared to be synthesized preferentially in liver, placenta, testis, colon and intestine. Substantial amounts are also detected in pancreas, kidney, lung, heart and skeletal muscle. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
